changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: P4 PR-18: mark record categories and seed RM root category metadata
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO categories ( id, name, description, path, level, created_by, active, purpose ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'Records Management', 'Seeded root category for record classification', '/Records Management', 0, 'system', true, 'RECORD' WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM categories WHERE path = '/Records Management' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'recordCategoryId', 'Record Category Id', 'Assigned record category identifier', 'TEXT', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'recordCategoryId' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'recordCategoryName', 'Record Category Name', 'Assigned record category name', 'TEXT', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'recordCategoryName' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'recordCategoryPath', 'Record Category Path', 'Assigned record category path', 'TEXT', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'recordCategoryPath' );

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM property_definitions WHERE aspect_definition_id IN ( SELECT ad.id FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' ) AND name IN ('recordCategoryId', 'recordCategoryName', 'recordCategoryPath');

DELETE FROM categories WHERE path = '/Records Management' AND created_by = 'system' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM categories child WHERE child.parent_id = categories.id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM node_categories nc WHERE nc.category_id = categories.id);
